variants.title: Fleetguard CS41010 Lube Filter Filters | Replaces the Donaldson P552206
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard CS41010 Lube Filter Filters | Replaces the Donaldson P552206
variants.description: Fleetguard® CS41010 uses the drop-in disposable rotor solution for centrifuges in Fleetguard remote centrifuge housings and Eliminators™ on Cummins engines ranging from 19L to 95L. These Fleetguard rotors replace the current assembly with a single drop-in option, reducing service time from 1.5-2 hours to approximately 20 minutes without the need for any special tools.
specifications: Style: Lube Cartridge, Efficiency 1: 40µ @ β100, Outer Diameter: 97.5 mm, Length: 177.8 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 40µ @ β100

variants.title: Donaldson P552206 Lube Cartridge
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P552206 Lube Cartridge is designed to provide reliable performance in lube cartridge applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.
specifications: Style: Lube Cartridge, Efficiency 1: 40µ @ β100, Outer Diameter: 97.5 mm, Length: 177.8 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 40µ @ β100
